testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //h1[text() = "Your Account Has Been Created!"], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//h1[text() = "Your Account Has Been Created!"]"}. (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.96, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.97 (6b3fa66a923a..., userDataDir: C:\Users\JERISH~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:60753}, goog:processID: 16944, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:60753/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.96, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: a138b5d3a51fe3b91ebb5edb84e58bba

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //h1[text() = "Your Account Has Been Created!"], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//h1[text() = "Your Account Has Been Created!"]"}. (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.96, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.97 (6b3fa66a923a..., userDataDir: C:\Users\JERISH~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:60753}, goog:processID: 16944, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:60753/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.96, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: a138b5d3a51fe3b91ebb5edb84e58bba at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:234) at actions.RegistrationActions.getGreetMessage(RegistrationActions.java:91) at stepdefinitions.RegisterStepDefinition.the_greet_message_should_appear_as(RegisterStepDefinition.java:43) at ✽.the greet message should appear as "Your Account Has Been Created!";(file:///E:/Expleo/QAFox/src/test/resources/features/register.feature:13)
